full_text:
Zhu Shuo (Yancai) 朱鑠 (彥才)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Shuo (朱鑠), styledYancai (彥才). A close aide of Cao Pi and one of his Four Friends. Said to be a thin man. Zhu Shuo was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
